## Specialist Investigation & Implementation

**Investigated:** Plugins installed on disk; `community-plugins.json` lists Dataview; frontmatter
projection healthy (99/99). Empty tables = Obsidian app not enabling community plugins. Docs had
contradictory guidance (CASE_INDEX claimed Dataview cannot read run state). CASE_REGISTRY hub
omitted [[CASE_DASHBOARD]]. Bootstrap copied Templater/Git settings but not Dataview `data.json`.

**Changed:**
- `scripts/obsidian/dataview-data.json` — committed default Dataview settings
- `scripts/obsidian-bootstrap.ps1` — deploy Dataview settings; expanded next-steps (Restricted
  mode, CASE_DASHBOARD verify, CASES.base fallback)
- `docs/obsidian-setup-guide.md` — **Activate community plugins** section; fixed run-state doc drift
- `docs/cases/CASE_DASHBOARD.md` — Bucket B query, empty-table troubleshooting callouts
- `docs/cases/CASE_INDEX.md` — projection truth; links to CASE_DASHBOARD and CASES.base
- `docs/cases/OPERATOR_HOME.md` — Dataview troubleshooting quick actions; stale IN_PROGRESS note
- `docs/cases/nex-case-021-pos-connection-hardening.md` — fix `[[nex-case-019]]` → full slug
- `scripts/obsidian-case-registry.ps1` — hub line includes CASE_DASHBOARD + CASES.base

**Not changed:** Stale IN_PROGRESS case closures (audit chain owns that); `.obsidian/` gitignore.
